query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tourStatistics` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tourId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `viewCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `uniqueViewCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `favoriteCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `shareCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `inquiryCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `bookingCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `conversionRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT 0.0000,
  `totalRevenue` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `popularityScore` decimal(10,4) DEFAULT 0.0000,
  `hasBeenLearned` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  `lastLearnedAt` timestamp,
  `learningPriority` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `lastViewedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
